messages: Explain in detail how a modern Android app handles cold start performance optimization, including class loading, dependency injection initialization, and UI rendering pipeline considerations. Provide architectural implications for large-scale apps.

Compare three architectural patterns in Android development: MVVM, MVI, and Clean Architecture. Include tradeoffs in terms of testability, maintainability, and runtime overhead in large production applications.
Describe how Kotlin coroutines are scheduled internally. Explain dispatchers, thread pools, and how structured concurrency affects cancellation propagation in deeply nested async workflows.
Explain how Retrofit integrates with OkHttp under the hood. Include call adapter behavior, converter factories, and how suspend functions are translated into HTTP request execution.
Design a scalable caching strategy for a fintech mobile application that must support offline mode, partial sync, and conflict resolution. Include data layer architecture.
Describe how RecyclerView recycling mechanism works internally. Explain view holder reuse, layout manager responsibilities, and performance pitfalls in complex nested lists.
Explain dependency injection in Android using Dagger/Hilt. Include component scoping, object graph creation, and how circular dependencies are resolved or avoided.
Discuss memory management in Android, including garbage collection behavior, memory leaks in Activities/Fragments, and how large bitmap handling affects heap pressure.
Design a real-time event system for a chat application supporting delivery receipts, typing indicators, and offline synchronization.
Explain how Android handles process death and state restoration. Include savedInstanceState, ViewModel persistence, and implications for navigation stacks.
Describe how pagination should be implemented in a REST API-backed mobile app. Compare offset-based vs cursor-based pagination and their tradeoffs in distributed systems.
Explain how logging and analytics pipelines should be structured in a mobile banking application. Include event batching, privacy constraints, and performance considerations.
Design a modular architecture for a super-app containing fintech, messaging, and e-commerce modules. Explain inter-module communication strategies.
Explain how ProGuard/R8 optimization works in Android builds. Include shrinking, obfuscation, and impact on reflection-heavy codebases.
Describe how you would implement a feature flag system in a mobile app with server-driven configuration and gradual rollout support.
Explain how large-scale apps manage API versioning on the client side while maintaining backward compatibility and avoiding fragmentation.
